creator: ap@bnc.net
text:
gtk12 needs glib to be installed for its configure scrip to run but glib is
not part of the dependencies (better: it's only a LIB_DEPENDS entry)

Fix: 

Change the Makefile to reflect the dependency.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
Try installing ethereal on a machine that doesn't have glib/gtk installed.
